description: Add cross-adapter worker lifecycle integration coverage for run/auto/review with deterministic success and failure-path assertions, stable JSON contracts, and canonical CI execution.

userStories.title: Scaffold integration-tagged worker lifecycle suite
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need a dedicated integration-only test suite under cmd/ so worker lifecycle coverage is isolated from default unit tests.
acceptanceCriteria: A new test file under cmd/ includes //go:build integration for the worker lifecycle suite.
The suite defines a top-level TestWorkerLifecycleIntegration entrypoint.
The suite is excluded from default test runs without -tags=integration.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define shared lifecycle flow fixtures and placeholder substitution
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need one shared lifecycle command-flow model so run/auto/review scenarios stay consistent and easy to extend.
acceptanceCriteria: A single shared fixture table defines lifecycle steps reused across workflow scenarios.
Flow arguments support deterministic placeholder substitution for values such as <run-id>.
Scenario runners dispatch through run<Command> helper functions instead of Cobra root execution.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add table-driven adapter matrix runner
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need one adapter matrix runner so identical scenario definitions execute against both Postgres and Turso.
acceptanceCriteria: A table-driven adapter matrix includes Postgres and Turso cases.
Each adapter case performs isolated setup and teardown with cleanup hooks.
Subtest names include both adapter and scenario identifiers.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Instrument harness for transition and terminalization tracking
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need deterministic harness instrumentation so tests can assert exact run and attempt lifecycle behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Harness store records per-run status transitions in an assertion-friendly structure.
Harness store records attempt terminalization calls with queryable counts.
Harness store exposes persisted snapshot references for downstream assertions.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add harness helpers for event seeding and factory restoration
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need reusable harness helpers so logs/snapshot scenarios can seed state and package-level overrides cannot leak between tests.
acceptanceCriteria: A helper seeds timeline events into the harness store for logs assertions.
A helper snapshots and restores all overridden package-level factories.
Factory restoration is guaranteed through t.Cleanup even when tests fail.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement success scenarios for run, auto, and review
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need success-path integration scenarios across workflow kinds so the core worker lifecycle is validated end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Success scenarios run for workflow kinds run, auto, and review using shared fixtures.
Each scenario asserts terminal run status is success and final attempt status is terminal success.
Each scenario asserts persisted snapshot reference fields are present and queryable.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify pull restores workflow artifacts on success paths
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need explicit pull restoration checks so artifact recovery behavior is proven for every workflow kind.
acceptanceCriteria: Expected artifact groups are derived via cloud.WorkflowArtifactGroups(workflowKind).
Scenario setup deletes target artifact files before pull execution.
After pull, expected artifact files are restored and readable.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement deterministic cancel scenarios
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need cancel-path scenarios so cancel intent and canceled terminalization behavior stay regression-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Cancel scenarios persist cancel intent and end in terminal canceled run state.
Attempt terminalization count for each cancel scenario is exactly one.
Post-cancel status assertions confirm canceled outcome from persisted run state.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement lease_lost lifecycle scenarios
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need lease-loss scenarios so interrupted execution paths preserve terminalization invariants.
acceptanceCriteria: Lease-loss scenarios assert terminal run status and reason match lease_lost constants.
Attempt terminalization count for lease-loss scenarios is exactly one.
Persisted run and attempt records match expected terminal lifecycle fields.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement profile_revoked scenarios with cleanup tolerance
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need profile-revoked scenarios so auth-revocation terminalization remains correct even when cleanup lock release is already absent.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile-revoked scenarios assert terminal run status and reason match profile_revoked constants.
Scenario setup forces auth-lock release to return ErrNotFound and terminalization still succeeds.
Attempt terminalization count for profile-revoked scenarios is exactly one.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shared JSON contract fixtures and decode helpers
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need shared JSON contract fixtures so status/logs/pull output checks remain stable and reusable.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared required-key fixtures are defined for status, logs, and pull JSON payloads.
A shared helper decodes lifecycle --json output for assertion reuse.
Required key fixtures use camelCase contract names.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Apply JSON contract assertions across lifecycle scenarios
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need scenario-level JSON assertions so adapter and workflow combinations enforce the same output contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Status/logs/pull scenarios using --json assert all required camelCase keys.
Assertions fail when snake_case aliases appear for migrated command contracts.
JSON assertion helpers are reused across adapters and workflow kinds.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add canonical make target and CI/doc invocation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need one canonical invocation path so local and CI execution of the worker lifecycle suite stays consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Makefile includes a dedicated target that runs only the worker lifecycle integration suite with integration tags.
CI workflow or repository docs invoke the new target as the canonical command.
Existing cloud lifecycle integration target remains available and unchanged.
Typecheck passes
